Data Fields
===========

The full list of available data fields is provided below. You can request and/or filter on any combination of these fields.

API

1. To filter on a specific field, refer to the [Advanced Filtering docs](https://sourcestack.co/docs/filtering/)
2. To include a specific field in the query's response, include the fields (separated by commas) with the `fields=` parameter:

   ```
   "https://sourcestack-api.com/jobs?fields=post_url,post_uuid"
   ```

Webapp

1. To filter on a specific field, write its name in the the row-input labeled `field`, adjust the operator dropdown to your liking, and write its value in the row-input labeled `value`
2. To include a specific field in the query's response, include it in the input labeled `Data Fields`

Managed Feeds

To change the filter logic or datafeed fields, contact your account representative

If the `fields=` parameter is not included, [the default fields](https://sourcestack.co/docs/reference#data-fields) will be returned.

The `categories`, `tag_categories`, `currencies`, `language`, `country`, `region`, `seniority`, `education`, and `tld` fields have [specific taxonomies](https://sourcestack.co/docs/accepted-values).

Example Queries
===============

### Queries[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#queries "Permanent link")

For any of the below requests, you can copy them as-is into your testing environment of choice - just remember to set the `X-API-KEY` header.

You can also instantly import the 40 queries below into Postman:

### **`/companies`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#companies "Permanent link")

#### Get Companies by Name[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-companies-by-name "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?name=Salesforce&exact=false
```

#### Get a Company by URL[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-a-company-by-url "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?url=salesforce.com&exact=true
```

#### Get Companies by Category[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-companies-by-category "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?category=Agency
```

#### Get Companies by Product(s) Use[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-companies-by-products-use "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?uses_product=BigCommerce
```

Note

without `exact=True`, this will match *any* of `['BigCommerce', 'Facebook Pixel for BigCommerce', 'BigCommerce Holding Page']`

#### Get Companies by Specific Product Use[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-companies-by-specific-product-use "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?uses_product=BigCommerce Checkout&exact=True
```

#### Get Companies by Product Category Use[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-companies-by-product-category-use "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?uses_category=Cart
```

#### Get the number of English-language companies using Google Analytics[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-the-number-of-english-language-companies-using-google-analytics "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?count_only=True&language=en&uses_product=Google Analytics
```

#### Get just the urls of WooCommerce Stores selling Marijuana Products[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-just-the-urls-of-woocommerce-stores-selling-marijuana-products "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/companies?uses_product=WooCommerce&category=Marijuana Products&fields=url&limit=500
```

### **`/skus`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#skus "Permanent link")

#### Get SKUs by Name contains[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-skus-by-name-contains "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?name=beachball&exact=false
```

#### Get SKUs by Parent Company[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-skus-by-parent-company "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?parent=Turtle Fur&exact=true
```

#### Get a SKU by SKU url[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-a-sku-by-sku-url "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?url=birdsarentreal.com/products/birdwatching&exact=True
```

#### Get SKUs by store URL[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-skus-by-store-url "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?url=farmbuyz.com&exact=False
```

#### Get SKUs by SKU Category[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-skus-by-sku-category "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?category=Jewelry
```

#### Get the product image links of every BBQ product and write them to Google Sheets[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-the-product-image-links-of-every-bbq-product-and-write-them-to-google-sheets "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/skus?category=BBQ&fields=domain,sku_url,sku_name,sku_price,image_links&export=gsheet
```

### **`/jobs`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#jobs "Permanent link")

#### Get Job Posts by Name contains[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-name-contains "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?name=DevOps&exact=false
```

#### Get Job Posts by Name[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-name "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?name=Platform Engineer&exact=True
```

#### Get Job Posts by Parent Company[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-parent-company "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?parent=Spotify
```

#### Get Job Posts by URL[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-url "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?url=canva.com
```

#### Get Job Posts by Specific Product Use[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-specific-product-use "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?uses_product=Docker&exact=True
```

#### Get Job Posts by Product Category Use[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-job-posts-by-product-category-use "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?uses_category=Container Orchestration
```

#### Get the Tech Use of every Data Engineer Job Post and write to CSV[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-the-tech-use-of-every-data-engineer-job-post-and-write-to-csv "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/jobs?name=data eng&exact=False&fields=post_url,job_name,tags_matched&limit=5000&export=csv
```

### **`/products`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#products "Permanent link")

#### Get a Product by Name[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-a-product-by-name "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/products?name=Shopify Plus&exact=true
```

#### Get Products by Parent Company[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-products-by-parent-company "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/products?parent=Cisco&strict=True
```

#### Get Products by URL[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-products-by-url "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/products?url=www.sendgrid.com&exact=true
```

Note

to get the most relevant product entry, first try as specific a URL as possible (e.g. here `shopify.com/plus` is preferable to `shopify.com`)

#### Get Products by Category[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-products-by-category "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/products?category=CRM
```

#### Get the Social URLs of eSignature Products[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-the-social-urls-of-esignature-products "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/products?category=eSignature&fields=product_url,domain,twitter_url,linkedin_url&limit=50
```

### **`/categories`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#categories "Permanent link")

#### Get Categories by Name contains[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-categories-by-name-contains "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/categories?name=Blogging&exact=false
```

#### Get Categories by Parent Category[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-categories-by-parent-category "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/categories?parent=SaaS&exact=True
```

### **`/quota`**[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#quota "Permanent link")

#### Get the number of SourceStack credits remaining in your account[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#get-the-number-of-sourcestack-credits-remaining-in-your-account "Permanent link")

```
sourcestack-api.com/quota
```

### Advanced Filtering[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#advanced-filtering "Permanent link")

[Advanced Filtering](https://sourcestack.co/docs/filtering) queries can combine multiple criteria.

#### POST /companies where the company is an eCom store and has at least 5 vendors supplying their SKUs[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-company-is-an-ecom-store-and-has-at-least-5-vendors-supplying-their-skus "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "sku_vendor_count", "operator": "GREATER_THAN", "value": 5}]
```

#### POST /companies where the first date the company was indexed was before Dec 15, 2020[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-first-date-the-company-was-indexed-was-before-dec-15-2020 "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "first_indexed", "operator": "LESS_THAN", "value": "2020-12-15"}]
```

#### POST /skus where the sku\_type equals 'shoes'[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-skus-where-the-sku_type-equals-shoes "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "sku_type", "operator": "EQUALS", "value": "shoes"}]
```

#### POST /companies where there is a value for `docs_url` (it's NOT NULL)[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-there-is-a-value-for-docs_url-its-not-null "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "docs_url", "operator": "NOT_EQUALS", "value": "NULL"}]
```

#### POST /jobs where the job is based in the country US, UK, or Canada[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-jobs-where-the-job-is-based-in-the-country-us-uk-or-canada "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "country", "operator": "IN", "value": ["United States", "United Kingdom", "Canada"]}]
```

#### POST /companies where the company website language is not in [popular English dialects][¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-company-website-language-is-not-in-popular-english-dialects "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "language", "operator": "NOT_IN", "value": ["en", "en-us", "en-uk"]}]
```

#### POST /products where the product\_name contains the phrase 'Cyber'[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-products-where-the-product_name-contains-the-phrase-cyber "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "product_name", "operator": "CONTAINS_ANY", "value": "Cyber"}]
```

#### POST /jobs where the hiring company's name does not contain the phrases 'bakery' or 'boulangerie'[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-jobs-where-the-hiring-companys-name-does-not-contain-the-phrases-bakery-or-boulangerie "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "company_name", "operator": "NOT_CONTAINS_ANY", "value": ["Bakery", "Boulangerie"]}]
```

#### POST /companies where the company is using Shopify and Klaviyo[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-company-is-using-shopify-and-klaviyo "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "company_name", "operator": "CONTAINS_ALL", "value": "Shopify, Klaviyo"}]
```

#### POST /companies where the company is not an Ad Agency[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-company-is-not-an-ad-agency "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "categories", "operator": "NOT_CONTAINS_ALL", "value": ["Advertising", "Agency"]}]
```

#### POST /companies where the company was first indexed before Dec 15, 2020 and last indexed after June 15, 2022[¶](https://sourcestack.co/docs/example-queries/#post-companies-where-the-company-was-first-indexed-before-dec-15-2020-and-last-indexed-after-june-15-2022 "Permanent link")

```
[{"field": "first_indexed", "operator": "LESS_THAN", "value": "2020-12-15"}, {"field": "last_indexed", "operator": "GREATER_THAN", "value": "2022-6-15"}]
```
